ascii_query::VariableInfo(3) Library Functions Manual ascii_query::VariableInfo(3)

NAME

ascii_query::VariableInfo - Variable information (from LLDB SBValue).

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/tooling/query/lldb_controller.h>

Struct members / array elements.

Detailed Description

Variable information (from LLDB SBValue).
